title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.080 - Oath of curators
text:
172.080.  Oath of curators. — The curators shall severally take an oath to support the Constitution of the United States and of this state, and to faithfully demean themselves in office.
(RSMo 1939 § 10796) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9639; 1919 § 11536; 1909 § 11110
